summary: Test suite is incomplete and disconnected. Critical issues: (1) Fixture files referenced in tests are not provided, making tests non-runnable; (2) No tests for cartesian product calculation logic or empty/single-dimension matrices; (3) Mismatch between bats tests and act-based testing - run_tests.sh expects specific workflow echo output (VERIFIED_*) that are never shown as workflow steps; (4) Missing edge cases: boundary sizes (255 vs 256), null/empty arrays, malformed entries, duplicate values; (5) No setup/teardown for fixtures; (6) Workflow structure tests verify file existence but not actual execution; (7) Core matrix computation in jq is untested directly. Would likely miss regressions in JSON handling and matrix size validation. Cannot run without fixtures provided.
